sectionTitle.default: Being observed is not the same as being observable

introText.default: Most observability stacks were built for dashboards and not decisions.

cardTitle.default: Tools aren't the answer — ownership is

cardBody.default: When observability is split across teams, costs skyrocket and visibility suffers. Consolidating your tech stack isn't enough; you need to solve the root cause. We provide the structural ownership required to turn disjointed data into a high-performing, unified operation.
